name: THE ADVENTURES OF LWANDA MAGERE
short_description: This is an action-adventure game based on the history of a famous Kenyan hero, Lwanda Magere and his encounters with other African heroes at large. Lwanda Magere was invincible to physical attacks, and had the ability to takedown entire armies.
detailed_description:
Lwanda Magere was a nigh omnipotent being that once lived in Kenya (Africa).
The Adventures of Lwanda Magere is a single-player action-adventure story based in Africa about his life experiences and interaction with other African heroes/beings.
Get to experience his life and abilities first hand: You take the role of Lwanda Magere who has supernatural abilities, you’re immune to physical attacks but your shadow is the only weakness. You are the protector of the Luo people. You assist various communities and villages to maintain peace and order in any way possible. You’re in certain missions assisted by your pets e.g. lion to accomplish certain tasks.
Enjoy the beautiful sights in Kenya and get to experience how powerful Lwanda Magere was as he settles disputes.
